introSection: Silver Bullet is a steel roller coaster currently located at Frontier City in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was repainted white and dark gray for the 2008 season.

The ride's train was destroyed by a fire in February 2022. The ride remained closed until spring 2023 as the destroyed components were replaced.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: White track and dark grey supports. The ride used to feature red track and blue supports.

fullText:
Silver Bullet is a steel roller coaster currently located at Frontier City in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, USA.

The ride was repainted white and dark gray for the 2008 season.

The ride's train was destroyed by a fire in February 2022. The ride remained closed until spring 2023 as the destroyed components were replaced.



White track and dark grey supports. The ride used to feature red track and blue supports.
